title: Session-scoped todo_write storage (deferred from #509)
description:
Claude Code's TodoWriteTool keys the todo list by agentId ?? sessionId (TodoWriteTool.ts L67). OC's src/tools/todo.rs uses a single global Mutex — every agent and session shares one list.

## Symptoms
- Subagent todos overwrite the main agent's list
- Resuming a session inherits stale todos from whatever last ran
- Parallel coordinator teammates collide

## Scope
- Thread session_id through tool execution (new ToolExecutionContext or add to execute_tool_* signatures)
- Replace TODO_LIST: Mutex<Vec<_>> with Mutex<HashMap<SessionId, Vec<_>>>
- Subagent path reads/writes under agentId
- Migrate any persisted todos to session-keyed format (via migrations framework #506)

## Deferred from #509
Closed the other four parity gaps (auto-clear, cell_id, domain filters,
multiSelect/uniqueness). This one requires invasive signature changes
to thread session_id through ~6 execute_tool_* entry points.
